description: Shared temporal/date fields reused across schema bundles.

agreement_date.name: agreement_date
agreement_date.description: Date of credit agreement or amendment.

effective_date.name: effective_date
effective_date.description: The date the agreement becomes effective, format YYYY-MM-DD.

expiration_date.name: expiration_date
expiration_date.description: The date the agreement expires or terminates, format YYYY-MM-DD (null if perpetual or not stated).

filing_date.name: filing_date
filing_date.description: Date the document was filed with the court or regulatory body, format YYYY-MM-DD.

execution_date.name: execution_date
execution_date.description: Date the document was signed and executed by all parties, format YYYY-MM-DD.
